header: Ship in days, not weeks — one booking covers it
description: Pro license, installation by the creators, and a half-day editor workshop, bundled. Booked separately that is €2,070; the Launch bundle is €1,790 — you save €280 and go live with the people who built all 255 elements setting it up for you.

items.name: Pro license, first year
items.description_text: Priority support, guaranteed LTS updates, and early access for 12 months

items.name: Installation & setup
items.description_text: The creators install, configure, and theme Desiderio on your TYPO3 site

items.name: Editor onboarding workshop
items.description_text: Half-day remote session covering previews, the wizard, and per-page themes
